description: 152 - 30-03-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson and Varun Chandra (Prime Minister's Special Advisor on Business and Investment, No.10
text:
Advisor on Business and Investment, No.10

ee

Subject: Re: Readout: HMA Washington
Date: Sunday, 30 March 2025 at 13:39:39 British Summer Time
From: Varun Chandra

To: Peter Mandelson
OFFICIAL

Hello Peter,

Many thanks.

I'm in the ae with Jonathan to try and resolve as much of this as possible

| will call you on the broader background, and on the specifics you mention. No need to
write anything — lots in motion. And of course important that you know what's what for
these conversations.

My best,

Varun

Varun Chandra | Prime Minister’s Special Adviser on Business and Investment
10 Downing Street, London SW1A 2AA | Personal _

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
